channel.title: Automating Your Everpure Infrastructure on davidstamen
channel.description: Recent content in Automating Your Everpure Infrastructure on davidstamen
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2008–2018, Steve Francia and the Hugo Authors; all rights reserved.

item.title: Using PowerCLI to Provision your Everpure Infrastructure
item.description: In the continuation of my Automating your Everpure Infrastructure blog series, next I will be covering how to use PowerCLI to provision your Everpure Infrastructure. This has been one of the most popular ways to automate provisioning, and alot of work has been put into making this an ideal automation solution.

item.title: Using Python to Provision your Everpure Infrastructure
item.description: In the continuation of my Automating your Everpure Infrastructure blog series, next I will be covering how to use Python to provision your Everpure Infrastructure.

item.title: Using Ansible to Provision your Everpure Infrastructure
item.description: I mentioned previously that there are many things I love about the Everpure Flasharray, but one of my favorite is how easy it is to integrate into different automation solutions. In this blog I will cover how to use Ansible to provision your Everpure Infrastructure.

item.title: Using Terraform to Provision your Everpure Infrastructure
item.description: There are many things I love about the Everpure Flasharray, but one of my favorite is how easy it is to integrate into different automation solutions. In this blog I will cover how to use Terraform to provision your Everpure Infrastructure. This will be the first post of many that show how easy it is to accomplish the same task using multiple automation methods.
